feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Alan Pulido: ‘Obviamente se extraña mucho el hecho de jugar en Chivas’

link.title: Alan Pulido: ‘Obviamente se extraña mucho el hecho de jugar en Chivas’

entry.content: A pesar de haber llegado al Sporting Kansas City hace casi nueve meses, el mexicano Alan Pulido no se olvida de Chivas y aseguró que extraña jugar en el equipo rojiblanco.
entry.summary: A pesar de haber llegado al Sporting Kansas City hace casi nueve meses, el mexicano Alan Pulido no se olvida de Chivas y aseguró que extraña jugar en el equipo rojiblanco.

entry.title: Ramdas Athawale बोले- Ghulam Nabi Azad और Kapil Sibbal BJP में हो जाएं शामिल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Ramdas Athawale बोले- Ghulam Nabi Azad और Kapil Sibbal BJP में हो जाएं शामिल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
There is a ruckus in the Congress over the letter case. Leaders like Ghulam Nabi Azad, Kapil Sibal, who wrote the letter, are being accused of having met the BJP. Now in this regard, Union Minister Ramdas Athawale has advised these two veteran leaders of Congress to join BJP.
चिट्ठी प्रकरण को लेकर कांग्रेस में घमासान मचा हुआ है। चिट्ठी लिखने वाले गुलाम नबी आजाद, कपिल सिब्बल जैसे नेताओं पर बीजेपी से मिले होने का आरोप लग रहा है. अब इसको लेकर मोदी सरकार में केंद्रीय मंत्री रामदास अठावले ने कांग्रेस के इन दोनों दिग्गज नेताओं को को बीजेपी में शामिल होने की सलाह दी है.
#RamdasAthawale #Congress #GhulamNabiAzad
entry.summary: There is a ruckus in the Congress over the letter case. Leaders like Ghulam Nabi Azad, Kapil Sibal, who wrote the letter, are being accused of having met the BJP. Now in this regard, Union Minister Ramdas Athawale has advised these two veteran leaders of Congress to join BJP. चिट्ठी प्रकरण को लेकर कांग्रेस में घमासान मचा हुआ है। चिट्ठी लिखने वाले गुलाम नबी आजाद, कपिल सिब्बल जैसे नेताओं पर बीजेपी से मिले होने का आरोप लग रहा है. अब इसको लेकर मोदी सरकार में केंद्रीय मंत्री रामदास अठावले ने कांग्रेस के इन दोनों दिग्गज नेताओं को को बीजेपी में शामिल होने की सलाह दी है. #RamdasAthawale #Congress #GhulamNabiAzad

entry.title: For Sure, The Cloud Will Go Down Again. Here’s How To Prepare

link.title: For Sure, The Cloud Will Go Down Again. Here’s How To Prepare

entry.content:
Most of the apps Americans rely on for work and play are run from the cloud, and are essential for getting pretty much anything done these days.
But what happens when the cloud goes down? After all, Gizmodo reports cloud outages are frequent, even if they rarely all go down at once.
First, secure your emails. You can enable access to your Gmail offline, or set them up to sync with a build-in desktop client, or one like Thunderbird.
Sync your files with a different cloud, such as Dropbox, and configure them so you can access them offline, if your ISP is down.
Finally, just give social media a rest. You won’t miss it!
entry.summary: Most of the apps Americans rely on for work and play are run from the cloud, and are essential for getting pretty much anything done these days. But what happens when the cloud goes down? After all, Gizmodo reports cloud outages are frequent, even if they rarely all go down at once. First, secure your emails. You can enable access to your Gmail offline, or set them up to sync with a build-in desktop client, or one like Thunderbird. Sync your files with a different cloud, such as Dropbox, and configure them so you can access them offline, if your ISP is down. Finally, just give social media a rest. You won’t miss it!

entry.title: நோய் எதிர்ப்பு சக்தியை அதிகரிக்க இந்த கசாயத்தை குடிங்க.. ஆயுர்வேத டாக்டர் கவுதமன் சொன்ன சூப்பர் அட்வைஸ்

link.title: நோய் எதிர்ப்பு சக்தியை அதிகரிக்க இந்த கசாயத்தை குடிங்க.. ஆயுர்வேத டாக்டர் கவுதமன் சொன்ன சூப்பர் அட்வைஸ்

entry.content:
சென்னை: நோய் எதிர்ப்பு சக்தியை அதிகரிக்க இந்த கசாயத்தை குடிக்குமாறு ஆயுர்வேத மருத்துவர் டாக்டர் கவுதமன் அறிவுறுத்தியுள்ளார்.
Ayurveda Doctor K Gowthaman said how to prepare Immunity boost drink
entry.summary: சென்னை: நோய் எதிர்ப்பு சக்தியை அதிகரிக்க இந்த கசாயத்தை குடிக்குமாறு ஆயுர்வேத மருத்துவர் டாக்டர் கவுதமன் அறிவுறுத்தியுள்ளார். Ayurveda Doctor K Gowthaman said how to prepare Immunity boost drink

entry.title: GABI MARTINS E RAFA KALIMANN TÊM AMIZADE ESTREMECIDA APÓS RESULTADO DE COVID!

link.title: GABI MARTINS E RAFA KALIMANN TÊM AMIZADE ESTREMECIDA APÓS RESULTADO DE COVID!

entry.content: A amizade de #RafaKalimann e #GabiMartins parece estar em crise! A cantora visitou a influencer em Goiânia e logo depois testou positivo para o #COVID-19. Confira o que Rafa nos contou!
entry.summary: A amizade de #RafaKalimann e #GabiMartins parece estar em crise! A cantora visitou a influencer em Goiânia e logo depois testou positivo para o #COVID-19. Confira o que Rafa nos contou!

entry.title: IPL 2020 : Suresh Raina Is Not Playing IPL 2020, Returns To India From UAE Oneindia Telugu

link.title: IPL 2020 : Suresh Raina Is Not Playing IPL 2020, Returns To India From UAE Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
IPL 2020 : Suresh Raina returns to India from UAE ‘for personal reasons’ and will be unavailable for the remainder of the IPL season, says his team Chennai Super Kings
#IPL2020
#CSK
#MSDhoni
#chennaisuperkings
#SureshRaina
#Harbhajansingh
#deepakchahar
#mumbaiindians
#ravindrjadeja
#ViratKohli
#RohitSharma
#RCB
#cricket
#teamindia
ఐపీఎల్ ఆడేందుకు ఎంతో ఉత్సాహంగా దుబాయ్‌లో అడుగు పెట్టిన చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్‌కు ఆదిలోనే పెద్ద దెబ్బ తగిలింది. చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్‌ తరపున ఆడుతున్న స్టార్ బ్యాట్స్‌మెన్ సురేష్ రైనా కొన్ని వ్యక్తిగత కారణాలతో తిరిగి భారత్‌కు చేరుకున్నారు. అంతేకాదు ఈ ఏడాది ఐపీఎల్ టోర్నీ మొత్తానికి దూరం కానున్నాడు.
entry.summary: IPL 2020 : Suresh Raina returns to India from UAE ‘for personal reasons’ and will be unavailable for the remainder of the IPL season, says his team Chennai Super Kings #IPL2020 #CSK #MSDhoni #chennaisuperkings #SureshRaina #Harbhajansingh #deepakchahar #mumbaiindians #ravindrjadeja #ViratKohli #RohitSharma #RCB #cricket #teamindia ఐపీఎల్ ఆడేందుకు ఎంతో ఉత్సాహంగా దుబాయ్‌లో అడుగు పెట్టిన చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్‌కు ఆదిలోనే పెద్ద దెబ్బ తగిలింది. చెన్నై సూపర్ కింగ్స్‌ తరపున ఆడుతున్న స్టార్ బ్యాట్స్‌మెన్ సురేష్ రైనా కొన్ని వ్యక్తిగత కారణాలతో తిరిగి భారత్‌కు చేరుకున్నారు. అంతేకాదు ఈ ఏడాది ఐపీఎల్ టోర్నీ మొత్తానికి దూరం కానున్నాడు.

entry.title: PSG - Thiago Silva, adieu aux larmes ?

link.title: PSG - Thiago Silva, adieu aux larmes ?

entry.content: Alors que Thiago Silva pourrait avoir disputé son dernier match avec le PSG face au Bayern pour prendre la direction de Chelsea, Thomas Tuchel pousse en interne pour prolonger le capitaine brésilien d’une saison. Retour en stats sur les performances d’O Monstro depuis 2009 et son arrivée en Europe, au Milan AC.
entry.summary: Alors que Thiago Silva pourrait avoir disputé son dernier match avec le PSG face au Bayern pour prendre la direction de Chelsea, Thomas Tuchel pousse en interne pour prolonger le capitaine brésilien d’une saison. Retour en stats sur les performances d’O Monstro depuis 2009 et son arrivée en Europe, au Milan AC.

entry.title: Louisiana Police Issue Dire Instructions to Non-Evacuees to List Next of Kin on Paper Inside Ziploc Bag

link.title: Louisiana Police Issue Dire Instructions to Non-Evacuees to List Next of Kin on Paper Inside Ziploc Bag

entry.content: Louisiana police are putting out some dire warnings for those who choose not to evacuate ahead of Hurricane Laura, including how officials can contact your next of kin. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has more.
entry.summary: Louisiana police are putting out some dire warnings for those who choose not to evacuate ahead of Hurricane Laura, including how officials can contact your next of kin. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has more.

entry.title: One Third Of U.S.High School Students Vaped In 2019

link.title: One Third Of U.S.High School Students Vaped In 2019

entry.content:
Nearly one-third of all American high school students used vaped in 2019.
According to the CDC, that figure is more than twice that of 2017.
According to UPI, in 2017 only 13% of US teens reported using e-cigarettes.
Approximately 37% of high school students surveyed said they are "current users" of tobacco products in 2019.
E-cigarette use among teens has increased even as more than 2,500 kids were diagnosed EVALI.
EVALI is an e-cigarette use-associated lung injury.
entry.summary: Nearly one-third of all American high school students used vaped in 2019. According to the CDC, that figure is more than twice that of 2017. According to UPI, in 2017 only 13% of US teens reported using e-cigarettes. Approximately 37% of high school students surveyed said they are "current users" of tobacco products in 2019. E-cigarette use among teens has increased even as more than 2,500 kids were diagnosed EVALI. EVALI is an e-cigarette use-associated lung injury.

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 6 Stage 6 - C’est parti ! It’s on !

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 6 Stage 6 - C’est parti ! It’s on !

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: Baby Nurse Shark Latched onto Mans Arm at Beach

link.title: Baby Nurse Shark Latched onto Mans Arm at Beach

entry.content:
Occurred on August 30, 2020 / Jenson Beach, Florida, USA
Info from Licensor: "Brought my daughters to the ocean for the 1st time. Within 5 minutes we saw a beachgoer get attacked by a nurse shark. He removed himself from the water and the shark would not let go of his arm."
entry.summary: Occurred on August 30, 2020 / Jenson Beach, Florida, USA Info from Licensor: "Brought my daughters to the ocean for the 1st time. Within 5 minutes we saw a beachgoer get attacked by a nurse shark. He removed himself from the water and the shark would not let go of his arm."

entry.title: Impactante: barrilete gigante arrastra por los aires a una niña luego de una fuerte ráfaga de viento.

link.title: Impactante: barrilete gigante arrastra por los aires a una niña luego de una fuerte ráfaga de viento.

entry.content: Sucedió en Taiwan, en medio de un festival tradicional donde se elevan grandes barriletes. En el video se observa como el fuerte viento arranca la gran cometa de las manos de la gente y la niña, que sostenía la cola, no tuvo tiempo de librarse y fue arrastrada por los aires, sin embargo, no pasó mucho tiempo para que la niña fuese rescatada sana y salva.
entry.summary: Sucedió en Taiwan, en medio de un festival tradicional donde se elevan grandes barriletes. En el video se observa como el fuerte viento arranca la gran cometa de las manos de la gente y la niña, que sostenía la cola, no tuvo tiempo de librarse y fue arrastrada por los aires, sin embargo, no pasó mucho tiempo para que la niña fuese rescatada sana y salva.

entry.title: Test Medicina 2020, a Milano prove con regole anticovid: ecco come è andata

link.title: Test Medicina 2020, a Milano prove con regole anticovid: ecco come è andata

entry.content: Le università riaprono i battenti agli studenti, almeno in questa prima battuta in occasione dei test di ingresso delle facoltà e tra le prime c’è quella di Medicina e Chirurgia. Una grande emozione quella evocata dal ritorno sui banchi anche se si tratta solo della prova di accesso ai corsi di laurea.
entry.summary: Le università riaprono i battenti agli studenti, almeno in questa prima battuta in occasione dei test di ingresso delle facoltà e tra le prime c’è quella di Medicina e Chirurgia. Una grande emozione quella evocata dal ritorno sui banchi anche se si tratta solo della prova di accesso ai corsi di laurea.

entry.title: Hardeep Singh Puri बोले,सरकार को नहीं चलाना चाहिए Airport,Airlines वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Hardeep Singh Puri बोले,सरकार को नहीं चलाना चाहिए Airport,Airlines वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Amid the ongoing debate over privatization of airports, the central government has indicated that it will increase further in the coming times. Union Civil Aviation Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said that Air India has been an important asset for us. But at the same time, he said that it is not the responsibility of the government to run airports and airlines. The Union Minister has expressed the hope that the privatization of Air India will be completed by the end of this year.
हवाई अड्डों के निजीकरण को लेकर चल रही बहस के बीच केंद्र सरकार ने संकेत दिया है कि आने वाले समय में इसमें और तेजी आएगी। केंद्रीय नागरिक उड्डयन मंत्री हरदीप सिंह पुरी ने कहा कि एयर इंडिया हमारे लिए अहम संपत्ति रही है। लेकिन इसके साथ ही उन्होंने कहा कि एयरपोर्ट और एयरलाइंस को चलाना सरकार की जिम्मेदारी नहीं है। केंद्रीय मंत्री ने इस बात की उम्मीद जताई है कि एयर इंडिया का निजीकरण इस वर्ष के अंत तक पूरा हो जाएगा।
#AirIndia #HardeepPuri
entry.summary: Amid the ongoing debate over privatization of airports, the central government has indicated that it will increase further in the coming times. Union Civil Aviation Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said that Air India has been an important asset for us. But at the same time, he said that it is not the responsibility of the government to run airports and airlines. The Union Minister has expressed the hope that the privatization of Air India will be completed by the end of this year. हवाई अड्डों के निजीकरण को लेकर चल रही बहस के बीच केंद्र सरकार ने संकेत दिया है कि आने वाले समय में इसमें और तेजी आएगी। केंद्रीय नागरिक उड्डयन मंत्री हरदीप सिंह पुरी ने कहा कि एयर इंडिया हमारे लिए अहम संपत्ति रही है। लेकिन इसके साथ ही उन्होंने कहा कि एयरपोर्ट और एयरलाइंस को चलाना सरकार की जिम्मेदारी नहीं है। केंद्रीय मंत्री ने इस बात की उम्मीद जताई है कि एयर इंडिया का निजीकरण इस वर्ष के अंत तक पूरा हो जाएगा। #AirIndia #HardeepPuri

entry.title: Environnement : quand les touristes nettoient la rivière

link.title: Environnement : quand les touristes nettoient la rivière

entry.content:
C’est une initiative prévue pour durer. A Strasbourg (Bas-Rhin), des touristes ont pu profiter d’une balade en canoë à tarif réduit en ramassant les déchets de la rivière. Où quand la protection de l’environnement allège le porte-monnaie.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: C’est une initiative prévue pour durer. A Strasbourg (Bas-Rhin), des touristes ont pu profiter d’une balade en canoë à tarif réduit en ramassant les déchets de la rivière. Où quand la protection de l’environnement allège le porte-monnaie. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: DP Ruto warns public servants over misappropriation of govt resources

link.title: DP Ruto warns public servants over misappropriation of govt resources

entry.content: Deputy President William Ruto has warned public servants that they will be held to account if they misappropriate government resources.
entry.summary: Deputy President William Ruto has warned public servants that they will be held to account if they misappropriate government resources.

entry.title: COVID-19 : India Crosses 34 Lakh Mark సెప్టెంబర్ 30 వరకు లాక్‌డౌన్ పొడిగింపు : జార్ఖండ్ Oneindia

link.title: COVID-19 : India Crosses 34 Lakh Mark సెప్టెంబర్ 30 వరకు లాక్‌డౌన్ పొడిగింపు : జార్ఖండ్ Oneindia

entry.content:
With the increase of 76,472 COVID-19 cases in last 24 hours, India crossed 34 lakh mark of coronavirus on August 29. COVID-19 case tally in the country now stands at 34,63,973 including 7,52,424 active cases.
#COVID19
#coronavirusinIndia
#CovidTest
#coronavirusinap
#Covidvaccine
#Indiacrosses34lakhmark
#కరోనావైరస్
భారతదేశంలో కరోనా కల్లోలం సృష్టిస్తూనే ఉంది .తాజాగా 30 లక్షలకు కేసులు చేరుకున్న పరిస్థితి ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది. ఇండియాలో కరోనా కేసులు రోజురోజుకు భారీ సంఖ్యలో నమోదవుతున్న తీరుతో పాటు ముఖ్యంగా ఫ్రంట్ లైన్ వారియర్స్ గా పని చేస్తున్న వైద్య సిబ్బందిలోనూ కరోనా కేసులు పెరగటం ప్రస్తుతం ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది.
entry.summary: With the increase of 76,472 COVID-19 cases in last 24 hours, India crossed 34 lakh mark of coronavirus on August 29. COVID-19 case tally in the country now stands at 34,63,973 including 7,52,424 active cases. #COVID19 #coronavirusinIndia #CovidTest #coronavirusinap #Covidvaccine #Indiacrosses34lakhmark #కరోనావైరస్ భారతదేశంలో కరోనా కల్లోలం సృష్టిస్తూనే ఉంది .తాజాగా 30 లక్షలకు కేసులు చేరుకున్న పరిస్థితి ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది. ఇండియాలో కరోనా కేసులు రోజురోజుకు భారీ సంఖ్యలో నమోదవుతున్న తీరుతో పాటు ముఖ్యంగా ఫ్రంట్ లైన్ వారియర్స్ గా పని చేస్తున్న వైద్య సిబ్బందిలోనూ కరోనా కేసులు పెరగటం ప్రస్తుతం ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తుంది.

entry.title: Agacée par les nombreux commentaires qu’elle reçoit sur les réseaux sociaux, Caroline Margeridon d’‘Affaire conclue’ révèle avoir fait refaire ses seins cet été - VIDEO

link.title: Agacée par les nombreux commentaires qu’elle reçoit sur les réseaux sociaux, Caroline Margeridon d’‘Affaire conclue’ révèle avoir fait refaire ses seins cet été - VIDEO

entry.content: Agacée par les nombreux commentaires qu’elle reçoit sur les réseaux sociaux, Caroline Margeridon d’"Affaire conclue" révèle avoir fait refaire ses seins cet été - VIDEO
entry.summary: Agacée par les nombreux commentaires qu’elle reçoit sur les réseaux sociaux, Caroline Margeridon d’"Affaire conclue" révèle avoir fait refaire ses seins cet été - VIDEO

entry.title: Covid-19 : le port du masque obligatoire « va s’étendre » dans tout Paris

link.title: Covid-19 : le port du masque obligatoire « va s’étendre » dans tout Paris

entry.content: Le port du masque va bientôt être obligatoire dans l’ensemble de l’espace public extérieur de Paris, a annoncé le Premier ministre, Jean Castex, lors de sa conférence de presse ce jeudi matin.  « Le préfet, après concertation avec la maire (Anne Hidalgo), va étendre le port du masque dans l’ensemble de la capitale », a-t-il indiqué sans donner de date précise quant à l’entrée en vigueur de cette mesure.
entry.summary: Le port du masque va bientôt être obligatoire dans l’ensemble de l’espace public extérieur de Paris, a annoncé le Premier ministre, Jean Castex, lors de sa conférence de presse ce jeudi matin. « Le préfet, après concertation avec la maire (Anne Hidalgo), va étendre le port du masque dans l’ensemble de la capitale », a-t-il indiqué sans donner de date précise quant à l’entrée en vigueur de cette mesure.

entry.title: Bintang Black Panther, Chadwick Boseman Meninggal Dunia Setelah 4 Tahun Berjuang Melawan Kanker

link.title: Bintang Black Panther, Chadwick Boseman Meninggal Dunia Setelah 4 Tahun Berjuang Melawan Kanker

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Sang bintang Black Panther, Chadwick Boseman, meninggal karena kanker yang dideritanya.
Itu adalah cuplikan salah satu film terlaris dari rangkaian super hero marvel, black panther.
Tapi, para penggemarnya dari seluruh dunia kini tengah berduka.
Kabar meninggalnya Chadwick Boseman diunggah oleh manajemen sang aktor, di Instagram resmi Chadwick Boseman,
"dengan duka mendalam, kami mengkonfirmasi kematian chadwick boseman."
Sebelumnya aktor Black Panther ini didiagnosa kanker usus besar stadium tiga di tahun 2016, hingga akhirnya kanker itu terus berkembang menjadi stadium 4.
Meski sakit, Boseman pun sempat mengakui bahwa dirinya mendapatkan suatu kehormatan, dengan memerankan King T’ Challa di film Black Panther.
Kepergian Boseman mengejutkan banyak pihak.
Jagat dunia mayapun dibanjiri dengan ucapan duka cita atas kepergiannya.
Termasuk dari rekannya di film Superhero Marvel, Avengers.
Chadwick Boseman dikenal luas dengan menjadi superhero berkulit hitam, yang meramaikan dunia superhero marvel.
Aktor kelahiran 29 November 1976 ini, tidak pernah berbicara kepada publik tentang penyakitnya.
Selamat jalan King T’ Challa.
Selamat jalan Black Panther.
Cintamu pada Wakanda, Forever.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Sang bintang Black Panther, Chadwick Boseman, meninggal karena kanker yang dideritanya. Itu adalah cuplikan salah satu film terlaris dari rangkaian super hero marvel, black panther. Tapi, para penggemarnya dari seluruh dunia kini tengah berduka. Kabar meninggalnya Chadwick Boseman diunggah oleh manajemen sang aktor, di Instagram resmi Chadwick Boseman, "dengan duka mendalam, kami mengkonfirmasi kematian chadwick boseman." Sebelumnya aktor Black Panther ini didiagnosa kanker usus besar stadium tiga di tahun 2016, hingga akhirnya kanker itu terus berkembang menjadi stadium 4. Meski sakit, Boseman pun sempat mengakui bahwa dirinya mendapatkan suatu kehormatan, dengan memerankan King T’ Challa di film Black Panther. Kepergian Boseman mengejutkan banyak pihak. Jagat dunia mayapun dibanjiri dengan ucapan duka cita atas kepergiannya. Termasuk dari rekannya di film Superhero Marvel, Avengers. Chadwick Boseman dikenal luas dengan menjadi superhero berkulit hitam, yang meramaikan dunia superhero marvel. Aktor kelahiran 29 November 1976 ini, tidak pernah berbicara kepada publik tentang penyakitnya. Selamat jalan King T’ Challa. Selamat jalan Black Panther. Cintamu pada Wakanda, Forever.
